data.label: FastCV
data.description: 高通 FastCV SDK 提供了针对移动设备优化的计算机视觉（CV）库，专为提高所有基于 ARM 的处理器的效率而设计，包括多种移动设备均可用最常用的视觉处理功能，为开发者提供了最多用的计算密集型视觉处理 API。

data.label: FastCV
data.description: The Qualcomm FastCV SDK offers a computer vision (CV) library optimized for mobile devices, designed to improve efficiency on all ARM-based processors. It includes common visual processing functions available across various mobile devices, providing developers with widely used APIs for computationally intensive visual processing.
